title: Liberty County Production Readiness Audit #1
finalDetermination: LIBERTY PRODUCTION READINESS AUDIT #1 — PASS WITH OBSERVATIONS

reportedState.condition: Correct only when local awareness and nearby/route surfaces use different scopes and the two active issues are outside the selected local awareness area.

mostLikelyStaleSurfaceIfIncorrect: route/nearby/mobile/bottom-panel count sourced from getUnifiedIncidents/getActiveUnifiedIncidents, alert-surface rows, or the max-based awareness reconciler
smallestRecommendedV729Fix: Add/read-only-log exact source, scope, count, and record IDs for each displayed active-count surface; bind nearby copy to the same area filter or rename route-scoped counts.

sourceInventory.activeHazards: Raw road hazard collection; requires lifecycle filtering before user-facing active counts.
sourceInventory.activeReports: Raw crossing/community report collection; requires getIncidentLifecycleState(report) === active for crossing active counts.
sourceInventory.recentlyClearedRoadHazards: Recently cleared road hazards retained for Recently Cleared visibility and active suppression, not active status.
sourceInventory.getUnifiedIncidents: Combines rail incidents, active road hazards, recently cleared road hazards as cleared, and future placeholder feeds.
sourceInventory.activeIssuesNearby: Bottom/mobile awareness active copy using normalized activeIssueCount after reconciliation.
sourceInventory.alertsPanel: renderAlerts/buildCommuteConsequenceIntelligence active unified incident model plus separate recently-cleared block.
sourceInventory.routePanel: Route-relevant hazards/alert rows/user-facing active road hazard incidents; not identical to selected awareness area.
sourceInventory.markersClusters: Unified incidents and hazard marker inputs; active consumers must filter cleared status.

runtimeHelpers.gap: No single Liberty production count source ledger helper snapshots every displayed count with source scope and record IDs after submit-clear cycles.
